name: harness-flow
description: HarnessFlow — From idea to shipped product: high-quality engineering workflows for AI agents. Spec-anchored SDD, gated TDD, evidence-based routing, independent reviews, formal closeout, and v0.6.0+ always-on orchestrator agent persona (agents/hf-orchestrator.md) replacing using-hf-workflow + hf-workflow-router. The orchestrator is auto-loaded via CLAUDE.md always-load (Claude Code plugin schema does not currently support always-active agent registration; per spec C-005 fallback).
